findings.what: Prop 'Alex Bregman Hits Over' from 2026-06-22 has no record at all in prop_history.json (not even pending).
findings.why: A prop with no record was lost between selection and settlement — missing from the prop-accuracy tracker entirely.
findings.fix: Check prop_history.json for the player; if absent, the prop settlement loop didn't pick it up (name-match or sport-routing issue).
